summary: Tested Step 5 hero card, Pós-Produção card, Post-Production drawer, and backend narration endpoints. All features working correctly. Hero card displays final video with FILME FINAL, DUBLADO, TRILHA SONORA badges. Post-Production drawer shows final video player with localization options. Backend endpoints for upload-narration (422 without file) and delete-narration (200) work correctly.

issues: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' - HTML nesting issue in music track select dropdown (line 363). The MUSIC_TRACKS.map() is wrapping option content in a span which is invalid HTML.

action_items: Fix HTML nesting issue in PostProduction.jsx line 363 - remove span wrapper inside option element
critical_code_review_comments: PostProduction.jsx line 363: MUSIC_TRACKS.map() generates <option> with <span> child which is invalid HTML. Should be: <option key={m.id} value={m.id}>{m.name} - {m.cat}</option>
seed_data_creation: Used existing test project fce897cf6ba3 with completed post-production
